card.name: Glitz and Glam, Double Trouble
card.text: Whenever a player taps a land for mana, add one mana of any color. Whenever a player draws their second card each turn, draw a card.

card.name: Two Minutes Notice
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Create X treasure tokens for each nonland permanent you control, then you may pay {50}. If you do, you win the game.

card.name: Cotton Candy
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Each player gains 2 plus X life X times.

card.name: City of Pride
card.text: When this land enters, you lose 1 life. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Beelzebub, Sin of Gluttony
card.text: Flying, lifelink Beelzebub enters with X +1/+1 counters, where X is the total life each players has above their starting life total.

card.name: Beelzebub's Celebration
card.text: Creatures your opponents control have lifelink. Whenever an opponent gains life, create that many 1/1 green and black Insect creature tokens.

card.name: Exorcist Sincarvers
card.text: Flying Equipment you control have "Equip—Pay life equal to this artifact's mana value." When this creature attacks with another equipped creature, draw a card.

card.name: Benevolent Bartender
card.text: Trample Whenever another creature enters, its controller gains 1 life. Whenever an opponent gains life for the first time each turn, they get an indulgence counter. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Love in a Bottle
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Each player creates X Food tokens. Activated abilities of Food you control cost {X} less to activate this turn. When you sacrifice a Food this turn, you draw a card and lose 1 plus X life.

card.name: Once We Get Up There
card.text: Scry 1, then draw one card. (You may cast all parts of this spell for its Reprise cost. If you do, it gains musical.) I — Reprise {5}{B}{R}{R} (You may cast any one mode of this spell for X=1 or cast them all for its reprise cost. If the reprise cost was paid, it gains musical.) (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) • I'll End You Just For Fun {1}{R}{R} — This spell deals 2 damage to each creature X times. II — • And Snag That Angelic Throne {3}{R} — Gain control of up to X target artifacts. III — • We'll Take Total Control {B} — You draw X cards and lose X life.

card.name: Mammon, Sin of Greed
card.text: Trample Whenever Mammon performs, create two Treasure tokens and draw two cards. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.) At the beginning of each combat, untap all creatures you control.

card.name: Let the Slaughter Begin
card.text: Untap all creatures. Creatures you control gain first strike, trample, deathtouch, and haste until end of turn. Creatures your opponents control lose indestructible until end of turn and must block this turn if able.

card.name: Jovial Jester
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, add one mana of any color. Whenever this creature performs, draw a card. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.)

card.name: Loser, Baby
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Counter target spell with mana value 1 plus X or less.

card.name: Exuberant Bombardier
card.text: When this creature enters, return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand. When this creature attacks, you may activate an ability of target artifact you control without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Wrathi Ranchhand
card.text: First strike Creatures you control get +1/+1 for each different combat ability they have. When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if it has two or more combat abilities, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play it. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Double or Nothing
card.text: Exile target spell you control, then flip a coin. If you win the flip, copy it twice. You may cast the copies without paying their mana costs. (Copies of a permanent spell enter as tokens.)

card.name: Ice of the Beholder
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Laugh it Up
card.text: Exile target creature.

card.name: Gonna Make You Wish That
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Reprise {6}{R}{G} (You may cast any one mode of this spell for X=1 or cast them all for its reprise cost. If the reprise cost was paid, it gains musical.) (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) II — • I'd Stayed Gone {3}{R} — Exile the top two cards of your library X times. You may play those cards during your next X turns. III — • You'd Stayed Gone 2G — Return up to X permanent cards from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: When I Think About the Future
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II, III — Reprise {5}{W}{U}{B}{R}{G} (You may cast any one mode of this spell for X=1 or cast them all for its reprise cost. If the reprise cost was paid, it gains musical.) (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) • I See A Better Place {W} — Create X X/X black Demon creature tokens. • You'll Never Fill Your Cup {1}{R} — Draw X cards, then discard X cards. • Don't Break Up The Band {2}{G} — Creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn. Untap them. • No One Gets To Live {2}{B}{B} — Destroy up to X target creatures. • I Try To Buy Us Time {5}{U}{U} — Take X extra turns after this one. Exile When I Think About the Future. I See a Better Place {1}{W}— Create one 1/1 white Demon creature token. I Climb the Stairway Up to Heaven {3}{U}{U}{R} — Gain control of up to one target creature. No One Gets to Live {1}{B} — All creatures get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Dark Shield
card.text: Defender, reach When this creature enters, gain control of all Equipment, then attach them to this creature. Whenever a creature attacks you, this creature fights it.

card.name: Next To Die
card.text: Target creature gets -10/-10 until end of turn.

card.name: Adam, The First Man
card.text: Flying, indestructible, haste Creatures your opponents control with mana value four or less are Cowards with base power and toughness 1/1. Cowards can't block Warriors.

card.name: Make a Deal
card.text: Reveal a card you own from outside the game, then target opponent may accept. If they do, you may play that card without paying its mana cost, then that opponent controls your next turn. If they don't accept, you draw three cards and lose 3 life.

card.name: You're Sloppy
card.text: Create four 1/1 black Incarnation creature tokens.

card.name: Squadron Executioner
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, you may search your library for up to three cards named Squadron Executioner, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Holy Light
card.text: Holy Light deals 7 damage to target tapped creature. That creature loses indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Deathray Battleship
card.text: Flying When this Vehicle enters, create eight 1/1 colorless Egg artifact creature tokens. Crew 8 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 8 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Razzle & Dazzle
card.text: Flying Whenever another legendary Demon you control enters, unchain Razzle & Dazzle Unchained — This creature gets +4/+4

card.name: Trap Under Rubble
card.text: Enchant creature. Enchanted creature can't attack or block and has "{T}: Destroy Trap Under Rubble. This creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn." and loses all other abilities.

card.name: Parry
card.text: All damage target creature would deal this turn is dealt to itself instead.

card.name: You're In MY House!
card.text: You're In MY House! deals 666 damage to target non-Demon creature you don't control. That creature loses indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Sir Pentious, Mastercraft Inventor
card.text: When Sir Pentious enters, search your library for an artifact card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {U}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Draw cards equal to the sacrificed artifact's mana value.

card.name: Grab-o-Tron
card.text: Equipped creature has reach and can block four additional creatures. Equip {3}

card.name: Flame Baton
card.text: Whenever equipped creature becomes tapped to pay for a spell with musical, increase that spells X value by 1. Equip {1}

card.name: Cherry Bomb
card.text: {1}{R}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one— • Draw a card. • It deals 3 damage to any target. • Target creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Toxic Bomb
card.text: {1}{B}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one— • Draw a card. • Exile target player's graveyard. • Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Radio Demon's Conduit
Smile
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card. Enchanted creature has lifelink

card.name: The Fruit of Knowledge
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Nifty, Queen of Filth
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 green and black Insect creature token. Then if you have more life than target opponent, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 black Rat creature token.

card.name: Voxtech™ Voyarscope
card.text: Flying When this creature deals combat damage to a player, look at that players hand, then scry 1.

card.name: Media Mob
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, create a Clue token.

card.name: Trust Us
card.text: Enchant creature. You control enchanted creature.

card.name: Voxtech™ Intern
card.text: Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Activated abilities of artifacts you control cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Moneyshot, Val's Handcannon
Adorable Companion
card.text: Tap two untapped creatures you control: Target player gains 3 life, then each other player draws a card. Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Gravity
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Repeat the following X times: Exile the top card of your library. If it's an Angel, put it onto your hand. You lose X life.

card.name: Voxtech™ Watch
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature becomes tapped for the first time each turn, untap it" Equip {1}

card.name: It Starts With Sorry
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Draw X cards.

card.name: Skinflayer 11,000
card.text: {X}{X}{X}{R}{R}, {T}: This artifact deals X+1 damage to any target X+1 times.

card.name: Whatever It Takes
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Up to X target creatures gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Eggbois
card.text: A deck can have up to twelve cards named Eggbois. When this creature dies, draw a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Hear My Hope
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Exile up to X target nonland permanents with mana value X or less.

card.name: Poison
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Until your next turn, whenever an opponent gains life, they get an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.) Each player gains X life.

card.name: Good Girl
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Untap it. It gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Tension
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. Target creature you don't control can't block this turn.

card.name: Trust Exercises
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Then if both creatures survived, draw two cards.

card.name: Mock
card.text: Counter target activated or triggered ability from a creature source. That creature gets -4/-0 until end of turn.

card.name: Respectless
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Return up to X target nonland permanents to their owners hands.

card.name: Alastor, The Radio Demon
card.text: Whenever another creature enters, if its power is greater than Alastor's, unchain him. {B}{B}, Pay 2 life: Draw a card. Unchained — Alastor gets +3/+3 and has shadow and ward—Pay half your life rounded up. (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)

card.name: Vox Populi, People's Voice
card.text: When Vox enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, put a propaganda counter on him. Then, gain control of target artifact or creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of propaganda counters on him. {3}{U}{U}: Unchain Vox. Unchained — Vox gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Velvette, Trendsetter
card.text: Whenever another nontoken artifact enters under your control, draw a card.

card.name: Carmilla, Arms Dealer
card.text: First strike, vigilance When Carmilla enters, search your library for an Equipment card and put it onto the battlefield attached to her, then shuffle.

card.name: Charlie, Princess of Hell
card.text: Affinity for legendary creatures (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each legendary creature you control.) Other legendary creatures you control get +1/+1 and have ward {2}. Whenever another legendary creature you control dies, unchain Charlie. Unchained — Charlie gets +6/+6 and has indestructible.

card.name: Weaponized Cards
Mobile Armory
Husk, Highroller
card.text: Whenever you cast your first artifact spell each turn, choose one at random — • Create a Treasure token. • Husk deals 2 damage to any target. • Husk gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. {U}, Sacrifice a Treasure: Draw a Card.

card.name: Eat Lead
card.text: Eat Lead deals 3 damage to target creature.

card.name: Magictastical Rubber Duck
card.text: Flying, haste

card.name: Ambition of a Dreamer
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 2, then you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Satan, Sin of Wrath
card.text: Flying, first strike, lifelink, menace, trample, haste Ward—Pay 6 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 6 life.)

card.name: More Than Anything
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Search your library for X creature cards with mana value X or less, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Everyone, Twice
card.text: Target creature loses indestructible until end of turn. Each creature you control deals damage equal to their power to that creature twice.

card.name: I'd Like to Buy You a Drink
card.text: Each player creates a Food token for each creature they control. At the beginning of your end step, if a player gained life this turn, each opponent gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Lucifer, Dreaming King
card.text: Artifact creatures you control have haste. Whenever you draw a card, create a 1/1 red Bird artifact creature token with flying. Whenever an artifact enters under your control, return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Path To Redemption
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap an untapped creature you control. Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Do What Was Required
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay 3 life. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: You Didn't Know
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Choose X modes. You may choose the same mode more than once— • Each player loses 2 life. • Create a 1/1 white and black Angel creature token with flying. • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Dramatic Revelation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay 3 life or sacrifice a creature. Target opponent reveals their hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. Exile that card. If you didn't choose a card this way, exile target card from that player's graveyard.

card.name: Vaggie, Fallen Exorcist
card.text: Double strike When Vaggie enters, you may put an Equipment card from your hand onto the battlefield. Vaggie has indestructible as long as she's equipped.

card.name: Cannibal Scepter
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 1/1 black Demon creature token. Equipped creature has "Creature tokens you control get +1/+1" Equip—Tap an untapped nontoken creature you control.

card.name: Ready For This
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Create X 1/1 black Demon creature tokens.

card.name: Angelic Dagger
Angelic Armory
card.text: Creatures your opponents control lose indestructible and can't gain indestructible. Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card

card.name: Angelic Spear
Eat Shrapnel
card.text: Return up to three artifact cards with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand. You may activate an ability of an artifact you control once this turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Morningstar Tridant
New Talent
card.text: This creature enters with three talent counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a talent counter from this creature. Then if this creature has no talent counters on it, sacrifice it.

card.name: Shok.wav
card.text: Flash Flying

card.name: The Weight of Thousands
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature. You draw two cards and lose 2 life.

card.name: The Angelic Court
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 and have ward {1}. {3}{W}{W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Exile target creature.

card.name: Emily, Compassionate Seraphim
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever a source would deal damage to you or a permanent you control, prevent 1 of that damage.

card.name: Angel of the Council
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Sera, Matriarch of Heaven
card.text: Flying, vigilance Artifacts and creatures your opponents control enter tapped.

card.name: Redeem
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its toughness.

card.name: Heaven in Lockdown
card.text: Flash When this enchantment enters, tap all creatures and put a stun counter on them.

card.name: Propaganda
card.text: Creatures can't attack you unless their controller pays {2} for each creature they control that's attacking you.

card.name: Relic of Sir Pentious
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card. {T}: Target player exiles a card from their graveyard. {1}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile all graveyards.

card.name: Determination
card.text: Draw X cards, where X is the number of cards put into opponents' hands from anywhere this turn.

card.name: Hell's Fair
Bio Bomb
card.text: {1}{G}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one— • Draw a card. • Destroy target artifact. • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.

card.name: Joint Research Project
card.text: Create a Clue token and a Treasure token. Then you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: Big Roach
card.text: Whenever an opponent gains life, you draw a card and lose 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn. When this creature dies, each opponent gets two indulgence counters. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Pest Extermination
card.text: This spell deals 1 damage to target creature. Target creature you control gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Airwaves at War
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose Radio or Television. • Radio — At the beginning of your end step, create a 1/1 black Incarnation creature token. • Video — At the beginning of your upkeep, mill three cards. Return up to one artifact card from among them to your hand.

card.name: Snag
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Impact
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land.

card.name: Reinforcements Have Arrived
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 4 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.

card.name: Spectral Knives
card.text: Reach, trample

card.name: Magician's Box
card.text: Flash When this artifact enters, target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Infernal Glamour
card.text: Create a Treasure token. Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each artifact you control. Draw a card.

card.name: Curious Cupple
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Prick and Hatchet's Fued
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, choose a combat ability. Target creature you control gains that ability until end of turn. Whenever a creature you control with two or more combat abilities attacks, create a 1/1 red and white Imp creature token with first strike that's tapped and attacking. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Bad With Us
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Draw 1 plus X cards. You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Lost Hotel Guest
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, you gain 2 life and scry 2.

card.name: Reckless Guest
card.text: Lifelink This creature has haste as long as you control another creature with three or more combat abilities. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Woefull Guest
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: I Brought Cookies!
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each player gains 3 life and you draw a card. Each opponent gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.) Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Gift Basket
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life, draw a card, add one mana of any color, and create a 2/2 green Bear Angel creature token.

card.name: Lucifer's Radiance
card.text: Repeat the following eight times: This spell deals 1 damage to any non-Demon target.

card.name: Flame Serpant
card.text: Flying

card.name: Joyful Siblings
card.text: When this creature enters, target player gains 3 life and you draw a card.

card.name: Blocked
card.text: Return target creature to its owners hand. If that creature was a token, return target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Vox Dei
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Gain control of each creature with mana value 1 plus X or less. Exile Vox Dei.

card.name: Orchard Dryad
card.text: Reach {2}, {T}: Create a Food token.

card.name: Scream Lightning
card.text: Scream Lightning deals 3 damage to any target. Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Bug Band
card.text: Whenever you gain 3 or more life, return Bug Band from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Scary Box
card.text: Indestructible When this artifact enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls. When this artifact leaves the battlefield, return the exiled card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Brighter
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) This spell deals 1 plus X damage to any target.

card.name: Might of Lillith
card.text: Indestructible When this artifact enters, exile target creature. {T}: This artifact deals damage equal to the exiled creatures power to any target.

card.name: Realm Sundered
card.text: Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Heaven Denizens
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, tap up to one target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Vox's Ultimatum
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play it. Whenever you cast a spell from exile, this enchantment deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Mute
card.text: Counter target spell. Tap up to one target creature.

card.name: Exploit Openings
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain trample and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Spike Wave
card.text: All creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn. You gain 1 life for each creature that died this way.

card.name: Slip Into Shadow
card.text: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Shadow of Evil
card.text: Each player sacrifices 6 permanents, discards 6 cards, and loses 6 life.

card.name: Hell Car
card.text: Crew 2 {4}, Sacrifice this Vehicle: It deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: Reduce to Scrap
card.text: Destroy target artifact. Create a Clue token.

card.name: Supportive Mantis
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control.

card.name: Spindle Horse
card.text: When this creature enters, each player gains 2 life.

card.name: Angel, Delight Sampler
card.text: Reach, deathtouch Whenever Angel deals combat damage to a player, that player gets two indulgence counters and creates a Food token. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Baxter, Mad Scientist
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, investigate. Whenever you sacrifice a Clue, choose one— • Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.

card.name: Tuned Overlord
card.text: When this creature attacks with another creature that has a combat ability, that creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Lute, Exorcist Lieutenant
card.text: Flying As long as you have 10 or less life, Lute has indestructible and haste. {B}, Pay 2 life: Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Abel, Cowardly Commander
card.text: Flying Abel can't attack or block unless you control another Angel.

card.name: St. Peter, Heaven's Mascot
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Spiteful Oligarch
card.text: Menace When this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a treasure token. If it has two or more combat abilities, draw a card, then discard a card. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Rosie, Delightful Cannibal
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 for each indulgence counter your opponents have. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.) Whenever an opponent gains life, untap each creature you control.

card.name: Zestial, Dapper Overlord
card.text: Reach, vigilance Whenever one or more creatures your opponents control attack, put a silk counter on up to one of those attacking creatures. Creatures with silk counters don't untap during their controller's untap step.

card.name: Valintino, Vice King
card.text: Whenever a creature an opponent owns dies, you may pay 1 life. If you do, create a Treasure token. {2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from an opponent's graveyard to the battlefield under your control. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step. If it would leave the battlefield, exile it instead of putting it anywhere else. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: KeeKee, Beloved Keeper
card.text: Ward {1} At the beginning of your first main phase, add one mana of any color.

card.name: Blitzo, Murder Professional
card.text: Haste Whenever Blitzo attacks, you may attach target Equipment to him. When Blitzo deals combat damage to a player, exile the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of combat abilities he has. You may play those cards until your next turn. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Millie, Relentless Brawler
card.text: First strike, trample Whenever another creature you control gains a combat ability, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. Whenever a creature you control with four or more combat abilities attacks, untap it. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. This ability triggers only once each turn. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Moxxie, Tactical Expert
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, another target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains and your choice of first strike, lifelink, trample, or haste until end of turn.

card.name: Unrivaled Presence
card.text: Reach, trample Whenever one or more tokens enter the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever this creature attacks, create a Food, Clue, or Treasure token.

card.name: Shameless Slug
card.text: Whenever this creature blocks, you may pay 1 life. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and this creature gains deathtouch.

card.name: Velvette's Influencer
card.text: Whenever Velvette's Influencer attacks, if you control another attacking creature, it gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Cantankerous Cannibal
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature an opponent controls dies, each opponent gets an indulgence counter and each player gains 1 life. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Funeral Caterer
card.text: When this creature enters, you lose 1 life and draw a card. Create a Food token.

card.name: Frightened Sinner
card.text: Haste Whenever a creature with power 4 or greater enters under an opponent's control, shuffle this creature into its owner's library.

card.name: Ratings Reporter
card.text: Whenever one or more artifacts enter under your control, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Maestro, Grand Conductor
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with musical, if X is 2 or greater, draw two card. Whenever you cast a spell with musical, if X is 5 or greater, untap all lands you control.

card.name: Thorned Menace
card.text: First strike, menace When this creature deals combat damage to a player, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Tavern Brawler
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Hatchet attacks, another target creature you control gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Reluctant Receptionist
card.text: Haste Whenever you sacrifice an artifact, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Whenever you cast your second noncreature spell each turn, Loona gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Verosika, Pop Icon
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control perform, put a +1/+1 counter on those creatures and draw a card. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.)

card.name: Fizzarolli, Headline Act
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, tap target creature, then untap target creature. Whenever one or more creatures you control perform, Fizzarolli can't be blocked this turn. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.)

card.name: Azathoth's Tears
card.text: Whenever a creature card is put into a graveyard, if it wasn't put there from the battlefield, put a tear counter on this enchantment. Once per turn, you may cast a spell from your hand with mana value less than or equal to the number of tear counters on this enchantment without paying its mana cost.

card.name: You Will Be OK
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Up to X target creatures phase out.

card.name: Badlands of Wrath
card.text: When this land enters, you lose 1 life. {T}: Add {W} or {R}.

card.name: Circus of Greed
card.text: When this land enters, you lose 1 life. {T}: Add {U} or {G}.

card.name: Palace of Gluttony
card.text: When this land enters, you lose 1 life. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Spires of Heaven
card.text: When this land enters, you lose 1 life. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Don't You Forget
card.text: Tap target creature and put one stun counter on it. (You may cast all parts of this spell for its Reprise cost. If you do, it gains musical.) I — Reprise {3}{U}{B} (You may cast any one mode of this spell or cast them all for its reprise cost. If the reprise cost was paid, it gains musical.) (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) II — • You Ain't Won Yet {B} — Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn. You gain X life. III — • You Are My Pet {1}{U} — Tap target creature and put X stun counters on it.

card.name: Dice Bomb
card.text: {1}{W}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one— • Draw a card. • Destroy target enchantment. • Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: We Can Do This
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Reprise {4}{W}{W}{G}{G} (You may cast any one mode of this spell for X=1 or cast them all for its reprise cost. If the reprise cost was paid, it gains musical.) (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) • There's Still Damage To Be Undone {1}{G} — Mill 3 plus X cards, then return up to X land cards from your graveyard to your hand. II — • That Is Not Where This Ends {3}{W}{W} — Return up to X target creature cards with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. III — • We'll Be Atop The Heap {2}{G} — Distribute 2 plus X +1/+1 counters among creatures you control.

card.name: Stolas, Prince of the Stars
card.text: Flying, ward {2} When Stolas enters, create Stolas's Grimoire, a legendary blue artifact token with "{1}{U}, {T}: Scry 2, then draw a card."

card.name: CHERUB Agents
card.text: Flying Sacrifice this creature: Up to three target creatures gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: DHORKS Field Agent
card.text: When this creature enters, you may attach target Equipment you control to it.

card.name: DHORKS Recruit
card.text: As long as this creature is equipped, it gets +1/+1

card.name: DHORKS Investigator
card.text: When this creature becomes equipped for the first time each turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you create a Clue token.

card.name: Exorcist Striker
card.text: Menace As long as this creature is equipped, it has first strike.

card.name: Cannibal Gourmond
card.text: When this creature deals combat damage to a player, if that player gained life this turn, that player gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Pinkie Fingers
card.text: When this artifact enters, each opponent discards a card. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life. Each opponent gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Gluttonous Patrons
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature an opponent controls dies, its controller gets an indulgence counter. This ability triggers only once each turn. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Cannibal Town Hosts
card.text: When this creature enters, each player gains 1 life.

card.name: Demon Brute
card.text: Whenever you gain life for the first time each turn, this creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Rosie's Waiters
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent gains 3 life and gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Mob Strongarm
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, create a colorless artifact Equipment token named Pistol. It has "Equipped creature gets +1/+1." and "Equip {1}." Whenever this creature attacks, if it's equipped, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Extermination Vetran
card.text: First strike Whenever an equipped creature you control deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Exorcist Bloodforger
card.text: Whenever a creature dies, put a forge counter on target equipment you control. Equipment you control have "Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each forge counter on this artifact."

card.name: Brute Force
card.text: Brute Force deals 1 damage to each attacking creature for each nontoken artifact you control.

card.name: Exorcist Headcleaver
card.text: Flying As long as this creature is equipped, it gets +2/+0 and has ward {1}.

card.name: Exorcist Painblade
card.text: Flying This creature gets +1/+1 for each other equipped attacking creature you control.

card.name: Angelic Boot Camp
card.text: Equipped creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Exorcist Butcher
card.text: Flying, haste When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may pay X life. If you do, destroy target creature that player controls with power X.

card.name: Striker, Hired Assassin
card.text: Double strike, trample When striker deals combat damage to a player for the first time each turn, creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Spin Maneuver
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0, first strike, and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Morphine
card.text: Target creature you control gains double strike and trample until end of turn. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to it this turn.

card.name: Human Disguise
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't be blocked.

card.name: Wrathi Homesteaders
card.text: Lifelink, menace When this creature attacks, create X 1/1 red and white Imp creature tokens with first strike that are tapped and attacking, where X is the number of combat abilities among attacking creatures. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Verosika's Mistake
card.text: Trample Discard this card: Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. When this creature enters, tap up to three target creatures and put stun counters on them. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, tap up to one target permanent and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Cruel Anchorwoman
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, any number of target players gain 2 life. At the beginning of each end step, if an opponent gained 3 or more life this turn, that player gets two indulgence counters. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Melancholy Clown
card.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control perform, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and each opponent mills 2 cards. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.)

card.name: Angelic Rifle
card.text: Equipped creature has "{2}, {T}: Exile target creature." Equip {4}

card.name: Electric Eels
card.text: Whenever a artifact enters under your control, this creature deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Deranged Husband
card.text: This creature has deathtouch as long as its equipped.

card.name: Hellborn Pitcher
card.text: Reach, deathtouch Whenever a creature blocked by this creature dies, create a Food token at the beginning of your next end step.

card.name: LooLoo Mascot
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Novelty Cup
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: LooLoo Band
card.text: Whenever this creature performs, put a +1/+1 counter on it. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.)

card.name: Copyright Infringement
card.text: Lands you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color." Whenever you cast a creature spell, you may discard a creature card and pay that spell's mana cost. If you do, copy that spell. (It enters as a token.)

card.name: LooLooLand Carnie
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Turn to Stone
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature. Enchanted creature is an artifact. (It's no longer a creature)

card.name: Verosika's Bodyguard
card.text: First strike

card.name: Loopty, Dastardly Inventor
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell with mana value 3 or less, exile it as it resolves. When you do, create a colorless artifact token named Spell Jar with "At the beginning of your upkeep, you may cast a copy of the exiled card without paying its mana cost."

card.name: Tour Guide
card.text: When this creature enters, look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.

card.name: Elderly Oligarch
card.text: When this creature dies, create two Treasure tokens.

card.name: Fluffy Friends
card.text: When this creature enters, target player gains 2 life.

card.name: CHERUB Manager
card.text: Flying Creatures entering or dying don't cause abilities to trigger.

card.name: Lyle, Robotic Oligarch
card.text: Triggered abilities of artifacts you control trigger an additional time. Whenever an artifact source you control would deal damage, it deals double that damage instead.

card.name: Hellhog
card.text: Hexproof When this creature dies, create a Food token.

card.name: Hellshark
card.text: Flash

card.name: Pain Game Rivalry
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+1 and gain trample until end of turn. Creatures your opponents control must block this turn if able.

card.name: Cursed Moon
card.text: Whenever a player taps a nonbasic land, that land's controller loses 2 life.

card.name: Tranq Gun
card.text: Equipped creature has "{2}, {T}: Tap target creature." Equip {1}

card.name: Truth Bomb
card.text: {1}{U}, Sacrifice this artifact: Choose one— • Scry 4. • Draw a card. • Return target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Aggressive Dancer
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike.

card.name: Verosika's Bandmate
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, choose one— • Return up to one target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. • Target player mills 4 cards.

card.name: Clubgoing Sinner
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap an untapped nontoken creature you control or pay {1}.

card.name: Curious Weapons Tester
card.text: Whenever you cast an Equipment spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Extermination Salvager
card.text: When this creature attacks, exile target creature card from a graveyard. Its owner gains 3 life and gets two indulgence counters. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Demonic Referee
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature with a combat ability and put a stun counter on it. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Nightlife Enjoyer
card.text: Menace When this creature attacks with at least one other creature with a combat ability, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Cupcake-Loving Child
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, each player creates a Food token. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target opponent may sacrifice a Food. If they do, tap this creature.

card.name: Happy Juice
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block.

card.name: Alastor's Emergence
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. When that creature attacks this turn, it deals damage equal to its power to each other creature.

card.name: Lillith's Memorial
card.text: Creatures you control have all combat abilities. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.)

card.name: Heavin's Probe
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your second main phase, if a creature left the battlefield this turn and this creature attacked this turn, create a Clue token.

card.name: Anxious Model
card.text: When this creature enters, draw two cards, then discard two cards unless you discard an artifact card.

card.name: Helpful Spawns
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, search your library for a basic Plains card, reveal it, and put it into your hand, then shuffle. If you didn't reveal a card this way, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Breaking News
card.text: The next spell you cast this turn may be cast as though it has flash, and it can't be countered.

card.name: Mammon's Clown Pageant
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library. You may shuffle. II — This enchantment gains "The next spell with musical you cast can be cast as though X were three greater." III — At the beginning of combat this turn, untap all creatures you control, then tap that many target creatures your opponents control.

card.name: Turf War
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Return up to three artifact cards from your graveyard to your hand. II — Whenever a nontoken artifact you control enters this turn, draw a card. III — Until end of turn, activated abilities of artifacts you control cost {6} less to activate.

card.name: Pain Games
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) II — Create two 1/1 red and white Imp creature tokens with first strike. III — Creatures you control gain menace and get +1/+1 for each combat ability they have until end of turn. (Flying, deathtouch, first strike, double strike, haste, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance are combat abilities.) ​

card.name: Founding of Cannibal Town
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 1/1 black Demon creature tokens, then each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature. II — This enchantment gains "Whenever an opponent gains life, that player gets an indulgence counter." (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.) III — Exile all creature cards from all graveyards. When a creature card is exiled this way, its controller gains 3 life.

card.name: The Final Extermination
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two colorless Equipment artifact tokens named Angelic Battleaxe with "Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has menace" and "Equip {1}" II — Angel spells you cast cost {W} less and 2 life more to cast until end of turn. III — Whenever a creature dies during combat this turn, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Paimon, Goatian King
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each player draws 2 cards. Each player may only cast one spell each turn, and opponents can't cast spells during your turn.

card.name: Stolas, Wrathwing Sovereign
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target opponent may have you gain control of a nontoken artifact that player controls. If they don't, unchain Stolas Unchained—Stolas gets +3/+3 and has flying, trample, and haste.

card.name: Pouncing Strike
card.text: Target creature gains +1/+1 and gains flying until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Demon-Obsessed Kooks
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 if an opponent controls a Demon.

card.name: Elevator Station
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Stage Controller
card.text: Whenever an artifact you control leaves the battlefield, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Aggressive Aura
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has first strike.

card.name: Masked Burglar
card.text: When this creature enters, gain control of target artifact with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Snotty Socalite
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, if an opponent controls an artifact, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Dazzled Stargazer
card.text: Whenever a creature performs, its controller gains 3 life. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.) Whenever you gain life for the first time each turn, each opponent gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Well-Fed Partier
card.text: Trample When this creature attacks, defending player gains 3 life and gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.) Whenever an opponent gains life, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Gluttonous Hellhound
card.text: When this creature enters, if an opponent has more life than their starting life total, create two 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens.

card.name: Overstuffed Glutton
card.text: When this creature enters, you may pay 3 life or sacrifice a Food. When you do, destroy target creature an opponent controls. Its controller gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Royal Attendant
card.text: Lifelink Sacrifice this creature: Target legendary creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Knife Tosser
card.text: First strike At the beginning of your upkeep, create a colorless artifact token named Knife with "{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: It deals 1 damage to any target."

card.name: Worm Horse
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with flying.

card.name: Desperate Showrunner
card.text: {T}, Tap target creature you control: Untap target artifact.

card.name: Insufferable Royal
card.text: Flying, vigilance Attacking creatures your opponent's control get -2/-0.

card.name: Bright-Eyed Goetia
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, draw a card.

card.name: Street Peddler
card.text: When this creature becomes blocked, that creature's controller may pay {1}. If they don't, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Sopping Scarecrow
card.text: Whenever an opponent gains life, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn and that opponent gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Downcast Patron
card.text: {1}{G}: This creature gets +2/+0 or +0/+2 until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Nifty's Swarm of Roaches
card.text: When this creature enters and whenever an opponent gains life, you may create three 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens.

card.name: Misguided Counselor
card.text: When this creature enters, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt until your next turn.

card.name: Look at This!
card.text: Musical Flashback—Tap three untapped creatures you control. Target player mills 4 times X cards. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Klown
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)
--- (Back):
--- (Front):

card.name: Addicted
card.text: Musical When you cast this spell, exile it with X time counters on it. It gains suspend. When a time counter is removed from this spell, each player creates Food token. At the beginning of each endstep, if a player partook this turn and if this spell has at least one time counter on it, that player discards a card.

card.name: Voice of
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Reprise {5}{U}{W}{W} (You may cast any one mode of this spell for X=1 or cast them all for its reprise cost. If the reprise cost was paid, it gains musical.) (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) II — • The People {2}{U} — Gain control of target creature with mana value X or less. III — • God 2WWW — Exile up to X target creatures.

card.name: Vee Tower
card.text: {T}: Add {C} {X}, {T}, Sacrifice a nontoken artifact: Search your library for an artifact card with mana value X, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Hazbin Hotel
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a legendary creature. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Asmodian Crystal
card.text: {T}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Cannibal Town Socalite
card.text: Menace When this creature deals combat damage to a player or becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, that player gets an indulgence counter. (At the beginning of each players end step, that player loses life equal to the number of indulgence counters they have.)

card.name: Aspiring Pageanteer
card.text: When this creature performs, tap target creature an opponent controls. (Whenever a creature becomes tapped or untapped during a main phase, that creature performs.)

card.name: Acrobatic Clown
card.text: {T}: Untap target creature. That creature gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Happy Day in Hell
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Juggeling is Cool
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Clean It Up
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Speedrun to Redemption
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Exile target creature with mana value X or less.

card.name: A Love Song
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Like You
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Hazbin Guarantee
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Out For Love
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Create X colorless Equipment artifact tokens named Angelic Battleaxe with "Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has menace" and "Equip {1}"

card.name: Welcome to Heaven
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.) Search your library for X basic land cards and reveal them. Put one onto the battlefield tapped and the rest into your hand.

card.name: Hell's Greatest Dad
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Hell Is Forever
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Crooked
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Look My Way
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Live to Live
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Easy
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Losing Streak
card.text: Musical (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped nontoken creatures you control. X starts at 1.)

card.name: Indulgence HUV
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you lose one life for each indulgence counter you have.

card.name: Spelljar HUV
card.text: At the begging of your upkeep, you may cast a copy of the exiled card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Stolas's Grimoire HUV
card.text: {1}{U}, {T}: Scry 2, then draw a card.

card.name: Angel HUV
